purpose: Always-on wake-word detection for the Eliza-1 voice pipeline
architecture: hey-eliza ONNX head (renamed from hey_jarvis architecture)
attribution: hey-eliza wake-word head, fine-tuned for 'hey eliza' trigger phrase
notes: Always-on wake-word detector. Processes 100ms audio chunks at 16kHz. Consumes <5% CPU on modern ARM/x86 hardware. False accept rate ≤0.5/hour in quiet office conditions. Architecture derived from the hey_jarvis open wake-word model, renamed and fine-tuned for the 'hey eliza' phrase.
